content: By integrating the 2025 ICM curiosity mechanism into LLM MemoryBank systems, we can create a self-updating long-term conversation memory that prioritizes storing novel, user-relevant information and actively prunes outdated, redundant context to maintain alignment with evolving user preferences. This framework lets the LLM intrinsically reward itself for capturing unexpected shifts in user interests, rather than passively storing all long-context conversation data.
